Home.title: Connect brands and influencers on a foundation built to scale.
Home.description: Initial frontend with internationalization, persistent themes, and shadcn/ui components ready for product work.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.description: Enter to manage campaigns, creators, and AI-assisted recommendations.
Login.helper: Don't have an account? Contact your administrator.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
errors.generic: Could not sign in. Please try again.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Initial overview for connecting brands with influencers through AI.
Dashboard.metricsSectionDescription: Activity overview. Values will be connected soon.
Dashboard.workspaceDescription: Campaign, creator, and AI recommendation modules will live here.
Dashboard.welcome: Your workspace is ready to grow by modules.
Dashboard.adminDescription: Section visible to administrators only: user management, permissions, and advanced settings.

Users.title: Users
Users.emptyState: No users listed yet. Create the first one using the button above.

Users.deleteError: Could not delete the user. Please try again.
Users.deleteForbidden: You cannot delete your own account.

CreateUser.title: Register user
CreateUser.description: Create an account with role and access credentials.

errors.generic: Could not create the user. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to create users.
errors.emailConflict: A user with this email already exists.
errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

EditUser.description: Modify access details and role for the user.

errors.generic: Could not update the user. Please try again.
